title: Cobblemon Extra
body:
### ! This modpack is old and is still on Cobblemon 1.6 and Minecraft 1.21.1 !
Cobblemon Extra is a modpack based on the Cobblemon mod, featuring extra features, optimization mods, and quality-of-life improvements. These include claim systems, a minimap, and a waypoint system. The modpack supports shaders. Cobblemon Extra includes Just Enough Items (JEI) installed, eliminating the need to constantly refer to the wiki. Finally, the modpack offers improved performance compared to the official Cobblemon modpack, while providing a more immersive and vanilla-plus fell.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
